race.comment: One for the babies. PRETTY SMASHING (11) has been thereabouts in all three career outings to date and this is not an overly strong affair. Placed over this distance range last time out and will be ready to peak now third run back from the spell. Rates the testing material. GRIEVE ROAD (2) hit the frame here when facing the starter for the first time and will have derived a stack of benefit from that race day experience. Has to be included in calculations. CATFISH (1) has placed at the past couple of runs and only needs some luck navigating from the sticky draw to be playing a major role in the finish. MASTER IN MOTION (12) will be better with that debut run now in the locker and cannot be discounted lightly. JASMINTINA (9) is next in line at odds with the claim from the low draw.
